zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthieu De Roye III於1262年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也時，他的父親Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny14歲，母親Alix de Boubers7歲。他於1295年與Jeanne de Vendeuil在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: Matthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthieu De Roye III was born in 1262, in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny, was 14 and his mother, Alix de Boubers, was 7. He married Jeanne de Vendeuil in 1295, in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1350, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthieu De Roye III est né en 1262, à Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Alix de Boubers, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Vendeuil en 1295, à Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1350, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthieu De Roye III 1262 in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny 14 und seine Mutter Alix de Boubers 7. Er hat 1295 in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jeanne de Vendeuil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 88 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthieu De Roye III è nato il nel 1262 nel Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Boubers, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Vendeuil nel 1295, nel Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1350, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthieu De Roye IIIが1262年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメロイで生まれた時，父Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbignyは14歳，母Alix de Boubersは7歳であった。1295年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメロイでJeanne de Vendeuilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年に88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthieu De Roye III(이)가 1262년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 로예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Boubers(은)는 7세였다. 그는 1295년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 로예에서 Jeanne de Vendeuil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthieu De Roye III nasceu em 1262, em Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Boubers, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Vendeuil em 1295, em Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1350, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthieu De Roye III родился в 1262 г. в местности рои, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Boubers, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Vendeuil в 1295 г. в местности рои, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1350 г. в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthieu De Roye III nació en 1262, en Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Alix de Boubers, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Vendeuil en 1295, en Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1350, a la edad de 88 años.
